message:
🐛 Fix mission stuck in running state, npm audit, and resilience (#2973, #2974, #2968, #2971) (#2980)

Mission stuck/timeout (#2973, #2974):
- Don't delete from pendingRequests on stream done:true. The backend
  sends a 'result' message after streaming completes. Deleting the
  request ID caused the result handler to silently drop the message,
  leaving the mission stuck in 'running' until the 5-minute timeout.

npm audit (#2968):
- Updated vitest and @vitest/ui to fix 3 high severity flatted
  prototype pollution vulnerabilities. 0 vulnerabilities remaining.

Resilience (#2971):
- MultiTenancyOverview: added retry button to empty state
- useBranding: documented intentional silent catch (non-critical)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
